title: Ensure that wait exits on state transition
body: When waiting for a container, there is a long interval between status checks - plenty long enough for the container in question to start, then subsequently be cleaned up and returned to Created state to be restarted. As such, we can't wait on container state to go to Stopped or Exited - anything that is not Running or Paused indicates the container is dead.

comments.body:
@edsantiago This is a partial fix for #2168 - I think there's another bug lurking there, but this at least ensures we don't hang forever.
